Do Not Use For: Body text, mobile, accessibility-critical content, dense menus
Implementation Hints: On mouseenter: requestAnimationFrame loop cycling random chars; resolve front-to-back with delay; on mouseleave: instant resolve or reverse

Keywords: number ticker scroll digit rolling odometer slot machine
Description: Individual digits roll/scroll like an odometer or slot machine to display changing numbers
Accessibility Notes: Final number in aria-label; provide instant display for reduced-motion
Best For: Dashboards, statistics, pricing, scoreboards, stock tickers
Implementation Hints: Each digit in overflow:hidden container; translateY to show target digit; column of 0-9 stacked; spring or ease-out transition
